name: obsidian-oxyde-vault-sync
description: Sync your Obsidian vault with Oxyde Vault.

scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp manifest.json build/oxyde-vault-sync/ && cp styles.css build/oxyde-vault-sync/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
